channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Italian Prime Minister Shares Deepfake Nude Photo of Herself to Warn About AI Misuse  PetaPixel
  2. Italy’s Meloni denounces deepfake photo as a political attack  AP News
  3. ‘Think before sharing,’ Giorgia Meloni says as AI-made lingerie image of her goes viral  The Guardian
  4. Italy's Meloni warns over AI deepfakes after false photos circulate  Reuters
  5. Italy’s PM slams sexualised AI-generated images of herself  Euronews.com

item.title: Coup Rumours: Putin Under Pressure From All Sides? - Kyiv Post
item.description:
1. Coup Rumours: Putin Under Pressure From All Sides?  Kyiv Post
  2. Vladimir Putin Is Much Weaker Than You Think  Foreign Policy
  3. Unsettled Kremlin tightens security around Putin amid assassinations and coup fears, intel report says  CNN
  4. Putin Living In Bunkers As Kremlin Fears Drones, Coups And Assassination: Report  NDTV
  5. Russian Offensive Campaign Assessment, May 4, 2026  Institute for the Study of War
